creator: bevan@bi-co.net
text: I recently reinstalled my system from the 12.0-RELEASE image. Indeed the provided ntpd.lead-seconds.list is expired. However, you can easily update it using "service ntpd onefetch". Also, this is typically performed automatically once a day by /etc/periodic/daily/480.leapfile-ntpd, so I think it's mostly a cosmetic issue.
